About.title: About Drumblow
About.who_we_are_p1: We develop high-level software for complex domains. Rust backends for performance and security, cross-platform apps in Flutter and modern web with Next.js. Our projects are in production serving churches, Canadian businesses and e-commerce/logistics platforms.
About.who_we_are_p2: Drumblow was born from the need to deliver robust, well-documented systems focused on real quality — not just prototypes. We work with technologies that prioritize reliability in production.
About.quality_desc: Extensive testing (unit, integration, contract), CI/CD with GitHub Actions, security audits (125+ tests on Invoice), well-documented migrations and reliable deployments.
About.tech_title: The right tech for the problem
About.tech_desc: Rust (Axum/Actix-Web + SQLx) for mission-critical systems. Flutter for consistent and maintainable UIs across multiple platforms. Next.js 16 for modern web experiences.
About.transparency_desc: Detailed documentation, clean code and real cases with metrics, links to production systems and real screenshots.
About.metrics_footer: Pentests and audits: 125+ tests (Invoice) + 21 vulnerabilities handled. Real integrations: Stripe, Canada Post, Cloudinary, Firebase, Google Maps, OAuth.
About.tech_stack_infra: Infra: Docker, GitHub Actions CI/CD, Oracle Cloud, Vercel.
